title: Reciclaje extremo de prototipos: SpaceX abraza la economía circular
title_en: Extreme Prototype Recycling: SpaceX Embraces Circular Economy
excerpt: SpaceX acelera su estrategia 'Moon First' reutilizando componentes de S29 y S30. El acero inoxidable de los prototipos retirados se transforma en infraestructura para Starbase.
excerpt_en: SpaceX accelerates its 'Moon First' strategy by reusing S29 and S30 components. Stainless steel from retired prototypes is transformed into Starbase infrastructure.
